event_name: Argenta First Thursday Arts & Music Night

seo.title: Argenta First Thursday — April 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: North Little Rock's Argenta Arts District comes alive on the first Thursday of each month with gallery openings, live music, and street energy on Main Street.

venue_address: Main St, North Little Rock, AR 72114
description: Argenta First Thursday is the monthly arts walk that has anchored the neighborhood's cultural identity for over a decade. On the first Thursday of each month, galleries open their doors late, restaurants offer specials, and musicians take up positions on corners and in doorways along the five-block Main Street corridor. The energy peaks between 6:30 and 8:30 PM when the street fills with locals moving between venues. It's the most authentic arts night in the metro — no tickets, no velvet ropes, just people who love their neighborhood showing it off.
